footer.blurb: Market intelligence platform: sector reports, indicators, and verified economic monitoring.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AEM Consulting · Researcha. All rights reserved.

home.heroSub: Access millions of verified statistics and market reports. Find the exact data you need — instantly.
home.featuredSub: Highly cited data points updated this week
home.exploreTopicsSub: Browse data from hundreds of verified industry verticals
home.platformTitle: Access the world's most comprehensive data platform
home.platformBody: Researcha gives you instant access to over 1.2 million verified statistics. Download charts in multiple formats, filter by region, industry, or date range — all in one place.
home.platformF1: Download as PNG, PDF, CSV, or PowerPoint
home.platformF2: Cite statistics with proper academic references
home.infographicTitle: The digital divide: internet access by country
home.infographicSub: The gap between high and low-income nations remains stark: top-tier countries boast 87%+ penetration, while the lowest remain under 20%.
home.pricingSub: Start free, upgrade when you need more.
home.trustSub: Analysts, journalists, consultants, and researchers rely on our platform for market intelligence.
home.methodologyStripHint: Enter your study parameters below. We suggest a sample size using common confidence levels.

featuredStats.title: Global GDP growth projections for 2024 by region
Share of renewables in global electricity generation

blog.title: Insights & news
blog.subtitle: Economic briefs, sector notes, and platform updates.
blog.empty: No published articles yet. Editors can add posts from the admin area.
blog.noBody: No article body has been added for this post yet.

methodology.title: Methodology simulator
methodology.subtitle: Estimate sample size and margin of error for your next study — with guidance aligned to common research standards.
methodology.disclaimer: Results are indicative. For regulated or high-stakes decisions, validate with a statistician.

corporate.title: Corporate services
corporate.subtitle: Team access, custom studies, and billing—we’ll reply with next steps.
corporate.name: Name
corporate.subject: Subject

myReports.title: My reports
myReports.subtitle: Purchased reports and active entitlements (demo data).

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Manual bank-transfer checkout. Transfer the amount to the RIB below and upload your receipt — the admin will grant your access after review.
checkout.mockNote: This is a UI placeholder — no charge will be made.

rib.subtitle: Manual bank-transfer checkout. Transfer the amount to the RIB below and upload your receipt — the admin will grant your access after review.
rib.heading: Where to send the transfer
rib.copy: Use the details below for your bank transfer. Tap the copy icon next to any value to copy it.
rib.uploadHint: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, PDF — up to 10 MB.
rib.submittedBody: We have received your receipt and the admin will review it. You will get access as soon as the payment is confirmed.
rib.requireAuth: You need an account to upload a payment receipt. Sign in or create an account to continue.
rib.notConfigured: The platform's bank details are not configured yet. Please contact us — we cannot accept a receipt without a bank RIB on file.
rib.noTarget: Choose a sector subscription or a single report to check out.

sectorCarousel.title: Pay per sector, monthly
sectorCarousel.subtitle: Each subscription gives you 30 days of full access to every report in the sector — past and future. Pick the sectors you actually need.
sectorCarousel.benefit1: All reports in the sector — full PDF
sectorCarousel.empty: No sector subscriptions are available yet. Admins can set a monthly price on each sector in the admin dashboard.
sectorCarousel.singleReportBody: Browse the catalogue and pay per report with the same bank-transfer flow.

payments.title: Payments & receipts
payments.subtitle: Bank-transfer receipts you uploaded. Access is granted once the admin approves your receipt.
payments.empty: No payment requests yet. Subscribe to a sector or buy a single report to start.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.p1: These terms govern your use of Researcha. By accessing the platform you agree to comply with them and with applicable law.
terms.p2: Subscriptions, one-off purchases, and refunds are processed according to the plan you select and regional payment rules.
terms.p3: Content is licensed for the scope of your entitlement. Redistribution or scraping beyond permitted use is prohibited.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: We process personal data to operate accounts, billing, analytics, and product improvement, in line with GDPR-style principles where applicable.
privacy.p2: You may request export or deletion of your data subject to legal retention requirements.
privacy.p3: Security measures include encryption in transit, access controls, and audit logging for sensitive actions.

search.title: Search results
search.noQuery: Enter a search term in the header to see results.

pricingPage.heroSub: Transparent pricing for market intelligence — from individual researchers to corporate seats.
pricingPage.ctaTitle: Ready for full market intelligence access?
pricingPage.ctaSub: Join teams that rely on Researcha for verified sector data and reports.

faqs.q: How secure is my data with Researcha?
faqs.a: We use strong encryption in transit and at rest. Report access is enforced server-side (RLS) — never only in the browser.
Yes. Upgrades apply immediately; downgrades follow your billing period rules.

faqs.q: What if I lose access to my account?
faqs.a: Use MFA and verified recovery email. Support can help after identity checks.

faqs.q: Can I buy single reports without a subscription?
faqs.a: Yes. The platform supports subscriptions and one-off purchases with entitlements enforced on the server.

auth.loginSub: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
auth.signupSub: Join Researcha to unlock reports and dashboards.
auth.signupTrial: Start your free trial. No credit card required.
auth.adminLoginSub: Sign in with a Supabase account that has the administrator role (profiles.app_role = admin).
auth.adminNotAuthorized: This account is not an administrator. Only admin accounts can access this console.
auth.adminSignedInAsUser: You are signed in as a non-administrator. Sign out to log in with an admin account.
auth.adminAccessDeniedBody: This area is restricted to administrator accounts only. Editors and subscribers cannot open the admin console.
auth.adminSupabaseMissing: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env
auth.adminEnvHint: Copy .env.example to .env in the researcha-app folder, set your Supabase URL and anon key, then restart npm run dev.
auth.adminConfigureSupabase: Configure Supabase in .env to use the administrator console.
auth.adminKickedForRole: Administrator access only. Sign out below and sign in with an admin account, or ask your team to set profiles.app_role to admin for your user in Supabase.
